user_query: I need to perform a GET request to test the functionality of a specific API. Can you provide me with the response for the GET request to 'https://austingreco-httpbin-test-v1.p.rapidapi.com/get'? Additionally, fetch a random fact from the Facts by API-Ninjas API.

TaskList.description: Perform a GET request to the specified API endpoint to test its functionality and retrieve the response.
Fetch a random fact from the Facts by API-Ninjas API.
